CharacterSheet.ShowModifiers: Ask to show modifiers when rolling ?
CharacterSheet.MinionsEmptyHint: No minions yet. Drag a Minion item onto this sheet to add one.
CharacterSheet.PetsEmptyHint: No pets yet. Drag a Pet actor onto this sheet to add one.

Item.Name: Name
Item.OverrideStartingMPHint: If set, this character starts combat at this current MP value, even above Max MP.

Augment.DropAbilities: Drop abilities, limit breaks, or traits here.

Settings.ToggleGear: Show Gear Tab on Character Sheet
Settings.ToggleGearHint: Enable this if you use homebrew gear rules.
Settings.LockArtworkRotationGlobalHint: When enabled, newly created prototype and scene tokens always have Lock Artwork Rotation turned on.
Settings.LegacyManaClickBehaviorHint: Invert left-click and right-click behavior for mana. When enabled, left-click removes mana and right-click adds mana.
Settings.AutoRollDirectHitDamageHint: Automatically roll Direct Hit damage after a Roll to Hit beats a targeted token's matching Defense or Magic Defense.
Settings.JobsAbbrvHint: Only used for Gear select input of jobs requirements
Settings.ThemeHint: Color palettes with which you want to display sheets.
Settings.DebugLoggingHint: Enable extra FFXIV system messages in the browser console for troubleshooting.
Settings.SoundSettingsMenuHint: Configure event sound files used by the system.
Settings.IconSettingsMenuHint: Configure primary and secondary attribute icon images.
Settings.TabIconSettingsMenuHint: Configure character sheet tab icons and role-based tab icon hue.
Settings.CustomTagsSettingsMenuHint: Configure custom tag lists for abilities, traits, and consumables.
Settings.UseRarityHint: Rarity property replaces Shop Tier property on tags when this setting is activated
Settings.CustomTagsHint: Comma-separated list of tags to add to this category
Settings.ColorSchemeHint: Color Theme for sheets of any type. Does not change FoundryVTT core interfaces.
Settings.AttributesImgHint: On a character sheet, primary attributes use an image as a border, which can be changed here to any image you upload.
Settings.HueTabsIcons: Change Tab Icon Color by Role
Settings.HueTabsIconsHint: Tabs icons on a Character sheet change color depending on role if set to true: blue (tank), green (healer) or default(dps)
Settings.TabAbilitiesImgHint: Choose an image file to use as the icon for the Abilities tab.
Settings.TabAttributesImgHint: Choose an image file to use as the icon for the Attributes tab.
Settings.TabRoleplayImgHint: Choose an image file to use as the icon for the Roleplay tab.
Settings.TabGearImgHint: Choose an image file to use as the icon for the Gear tab.
Settings.TabItemsImgHint: Choose an image file to use as the icon for the Items tab.
Settings.TabCompanionsImgHint: Choose an image file to use as the icon for the Companions tab.
Settings.TabSettingsImgHint: Choose an image file to use as the icon for the Settings tab.
Settings.SoundNotificationFFXIVHint: Adds a few sounds triggered by action such as another player logs in, opening/closing your character sheet, moving items in your inventory, etc.
Settings.soundNotificationFFXIV_Hint: Select a sound file to play when this event is triggered. Leave empty to never play this.
Settings.OverrideColorSchemeHint: Override core setting light/dark color scheme with a blue color scheme inspired from FFXIV in-game blue color scheme.

Dialogs.Confirm: Are you sure you want to complete this action?
Dialogs.ItemDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item : {itemName}?

Notifications.EffectRequest: {playerName} asks to apply effect "{effect}" to the following targets:
Notifications.HealRequest: {playerName} asks to heal "{heal}" HP to the following targets:
Notifications.DamageRequest: {playerName} asks to deal "{damage}" HP to the following targets:
Notifications.MacroItemMissing: The item for this macro could not be found.
Notifications.NoSoundAvailable: No sound files found in the system soundboard directory.
Notifications.InventoryFull: Inventory is full. Free up a slot before adding another item.
Notifications.ItemMigrationInProgress: ITEM DATA MIGRATION IN PROGRESS. DO NOT CLOSE THE WORLD, DO NOT REFRESH, AND DO NOT SHUT DOWN FOUNDRY UNTIL IT COMPLETES. Interrupting this process can corrupt item data. Framerate may temporarily drop during migration.
Notifications.ItemMigrationProgressStarting: Item migration starting. Preparing migration steps...
Notifications.ItemMigrationPhaseShopTierStart: Item migration: updating shop tier data...
Notifications.ItemMigrationPhaseShopTierDone: Item migration: shop tier update complete ({updatedWorldItems} world, {updatedActorItems} actor items).
Notifications.ItemMigrationPhaseFormulaStart: Item migration: updating action formula fields...
Notifications.ItemMigrationPhaseFormulaDone: Item migration: action formula update complete ({updatedWorldItems} world, {updatedActorItems} actor items).
Notifications.ItemMigrationPhaseHpCostStart: Item migration: updating HP cost fields...
Notifications.ItemMigrationPhaseHpCostDone: Item migration: HP cost update complete ({updatedWorldItems} world, {updatedActorItems} actor items).
Notifications.ItemMigrationPhaseTagDone: Item migration: tag update complete ({updatedWorldItems} world, {updatedActorItems} actor items, {updatedCompendiumItems} compendium items, {updatedActorCompendiumItems} actor compendium items).
Notifications.ItemMigrationPhaseAbilityTypeDone: Item migration: legacy ability conversion complete ({createdWorldItems}/{deletedWorldItems} world recreated, {createdActorItems}/{deletedActorItems} actor recreated, {updatedWorldTags} world tags, {updatedActorTags} actor tags, {updatedAbilityOrders} actor sort orders, {updatedJobGrantUUIDs} job/augment grant links remapped, {updatedUUIDTextLinks} text UUID links remapped).
Notifications.ItemMigrationFailed: Item data migration failed. Check the browser console for details.
Notifications.NotEnoughHP: Not Enough HP to cast this ability (HP Cost)
Notifications.LimitationsConsumed: All limitations for this ability are consumed.
Notifications.CharacterSheetLocked: This character sheet is locked. Enable edit mode to make changes.
Notifications.ActorEffectFromItemLocked: This effect comes from an item. Edit or remove it from the source ability/item.

Warning.NoD20AdvantageIgnored: No d20 in formula — advantage dice ignored.

Instructions.ClickToPlace: Move the preview, then click on the canvas to place the marker. Right-click to cancel.
Instructions.ClickToken: Click a token to bind the targeted marker. Right-click to cancel.
Instructions.RequestSent: Marker placement sent to the GM.

Errors.TileFailed: Failed to create tile. See console.
Errors.EmptyShape: Choose at least one marker square.
Errors.NoGM: A GM must be connected to place markers for players.
